one_liner: Intercom offers a broad, well-documented REST API with Bearer token (private) and OAuth (public) auth, a free self-serve developer workspace, and an official hosted MCP server, making it buildable now for AI-agent tooling.

auth_methods.notes: Access Tokens (Bearer) for private apps accessing your own workspace, generated via Developer Hub.
OAuth flow required for public apps accessing other users' data, using Client ID/Secret to exchange code for access token.

self_serve_notes: Free, self-serve developer workspace available for building/testing (US region only, limited functionality). Access Tokens can be generated immediately via Developer Hub without sales contact. Full production use requires a paid Intercom subscription.

api_surface.notes: Broad REST API covering conversations, contacts, admins, AI content, tickets, etc. Multiple regional servers (US/EU/AU).

evidence.supports: Access Token vs OAuth authentication methods
Broad REST API surface with bearerAuth security scheme
Self-serve creation of access tokens via Developer Hub
Free self-serve developer workspace for building/testing

flags: Official MCP server limited to US-hosted workspaces
Developer workspace has functional restrictions (no outbound email/push notifications)
Production use requires separate paid customer agreement
